column1: HTS classification: Two likely codes — confirm with licensed customs broker before MP order.
Option 1: HTS 4202.12 — cases for spectacles / eyewear. Base MFN rate ~5.3% + Section 301 additional.
Option 2: HTS 8504.40 — static converters / power banks. Base MFN rate ~0% + Section 301 additional.
Tariff basis: Dutiable value = transaction value (ex-factory price) = $26.23/unit per US CBP standard.
As of April 2026 executive orders have escalated Section 301 tariffs on Chinese goods — confirm current applicable rate with broker.
